welcome.preview: Hi {name}! Thanks for your interest in {vehicle}. Our sales team will reach out within 30 minutes with a quote and test drive options. Reply STOP to opt out.

appointment_reminder.preview: Reminder: your test drive for {vehicle} is tomorrow at {time}. Address: {address}. Reply YES to confirm.

re_engagement.preview: Hi {name}! New arrivals in your interested segment ({segment}) — reply CATALOGUE to see brochures.

consent_request.preview: Please review and sign your finance application form: {link}
